comment.body:
So $20K+ per month isn’t enough? I apologized in advance for bringing it up, as this reaction was highly predictable. But would be nice to get some more education material to we can be more self sufficient. Right now we are just trading off information she gives us with no means to be able to produce it ourselves currently.

If it’s not replicable, then she should just claim this to be a quant investment service, not educational. No harm there. But some healthy accountability for previous promises made is not a bad thing and shouldn’t be ostracized.

comment.body:
That’s how much she is making.

I didn’t set the expectations here. I’m just wondering what this sub is. If it isn’t as educational, that’s okay. If it is, then she’s fallen off the rails a little bit with the educational material. Maybe she plans to get back on it. Not sure. But if you go back, she has made a lot of promises about Option Depth videos and other educational material that hasn’t come to fruition… yet. She championed this being an educational service and to empower us to use this info in a way that we are self sufficient. 

Another member has also seen her fall off the rails a bit. I understand why the outrage is happening here, but it doesn’t seem to be very reasonable. The “honeymoon” phase thing is a joke, with some truth to it, hence why it would be funny.

Although there might be too much truth to it, so it’s offensive. Don’t know.
